mapper.select:
select sku.id as sku_id, sku.*, item.id as item_id, item.* from wms_item_sku sku inner join wms_item item on sku.item_id=item.id where sku.id in
#{id}
select sku.id as sku_id, sku.*, item.id as item_id, item.* from wms_item_sku sku inner join wms_item item on sku.item_id=item.id where sku.id = #{id}

SELECT item.id, item.item_name, item.item_no, category.category_name, sku.id AS sku_id, sku.sku_name, sku.sku_no, sku.length, sku.width, sku.height, sku.gross_weight, sku.net_weight, sku.unit_price, item.id AS item_id FROM wms_item_sku sku LEFT JOIN wms_item item ON sku.item_id = item.id LEFT JOIN wms_item_category category ON item.item_category = category.id
and item.item_name like concat('%', #{dto.itemName}, '%')
and item.item_no like concat('%', #{dto.itemNo}, '%')
and sku.sku_name like concat('%', #{dto.skuName}, '%')
and (category.id=#{dto.itemCategory} or category.parent_id=#{dto.itemCategory})
order by sku.item_id desc
